title: Racosperma whibleyanum

Its classification is based on its morphological characteristics, genetic makeup, and evolutionary history.

intro: Racosperma whibleyanum, also known as Acacia whibleyana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of pathogens and reduce oxidative stress.
